mapper.select: SELECT id, account, avatar_url, username, nick_name, description, following_num, followers_num, posts_num, like_avg_num, comment_avg_num, play_avg_num, tag, country, platform_type, keyword, new_tag, face_status, del_flag, kol_price_min, kol_price_max, dislike_tags, like_tags, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM store_celebrity WHERE del_flag = 0 AND id IN (SELECT following_id FROM store_level WHERE user_id = #{storeCelebrityModel.id})

SELECT account, nick_name, followers_num, tag, like_tags, posts_num, gender, age, kol_price_min, kol_price_max FROM store_celebrity WHERE followers_num > 100000 AND posts_num > 0 AND like_tags IS NOT NULL AND like_tags != '' AND like_tags LIKE '%,%' AND tag IS NOT NULL AND tag != '' AND tag LIKE '%,%' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 4
SELECT id FROM store_celebrity ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 30
